description_long: This is a modern, pentagonal wooden table with a distinctive geometric design. The tabletop features a rich, natural wood grain pattern with a glossy finish, giving it a sophisticated and contemporary appearance. The table is supported by three wide, flat legs that are integrated seamlessly into the corners, providing both stability and a unique visual profile. The edges of the tabletop are sharply angled, contributing to its striking, architectural look. The overall construction appears solid and robust, suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban environments. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional features, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A pentagonal, glossy wooden table with three wide, integrated legs and a striking geometric design. The natural wood grain and sharp angles give it a modern, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pentagonal tabletop and two of the three wide, flat legs, highlighting the table's geometric symmetry.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the tabletop and the seamless integration of the legs into the corners.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying all three supporting legs and the full pentagonal shape of the tabletop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thickness of the tabletop and the clean, uninterrupted wood grain pattern.
